Container.Name: YAHLP-Full
Container.Description: YAHLP - Complete Master Template with ALL configuration options
Container.Overview: YAHLP - Yet Another HomeLab Portal. Complete template with all 19 services and comprehensive configuration options.

Config.Name: Test Mode
Config.Description: Enable test/debug mode. Set to 'true' to prevent Let's Encrypt rate limiting during setup. Certificates will NOT be issued in test mode.

Config.Name: Access Mode
Config.Description: Choose 'private' for HTTP only on internal network, or 'public' for HTTPS with Let's Encrypt certificate.

Config.Name: Domain (Public Only)
Config.Description: Your domain name for public mode (e.g., media.example.com). Leave blank for private mode.

Config.Name: Email (Public Only)
Config.Description: Email for SSL certificate notifications. Required for public mode.

Config.Name: IP Address (Private Only)
Config.Description: Server IP for private mode (e.g., 192.168.1.100). Leave blank for auto-assign.

Config.Name: Dashboard Title
Config.Description: Name displayed in dashboard header and browser title.

Config.Name: Dashboard Color
Config.Description: Primary color in hex format (e.g., #00A99D). Sets dashboard accent color.

Config.Name: Dashboard Layout
Config.Description: Choose layout: classic (rows), modern (grid), storm (dark), storm-violet (purple), neon (bright), focus (iframe focus), vixens (custom), minimal (compact).

Config.Name: Lock Layout
Config.Description: Set 'true' to prevent users from switching dashboard layouts. Keep 'false' to allow switching.

Config.Name: Service Display Order
Config.Description: Comma-separated service codes controlling display order. Codes: JEL=Jellyfin, PLX=Plex, EMB=Emby, SON=Sonarr, RAD=Radarr, LID=Lidarr, WHI=Whisparr, QBI=qBittorrent, TRA=Transmission, SAB=SABnzbd, GET=NZBget, DEL=Deluge, HYD=NZBHydra, PRO=Prowlarr, SEE=Seerr, JAC=Jackett, BAZ=Bazarr, TAU=Tautulli, MNT=Maintainerr.

Config.Name: Landing Page
Config.Description: Default page on load (e.g., sonarr/calendar, radarr/upcoming). Leave blank to show dashboard grid.

Config.Name: Authentication Type
Config.Description: Choose: 'none' (no auth), 'basic' (username/password), 'google' (Google OAuth), 'entra' (Microsoft Entra ID).

Config.Name: Basic Auth Username
Config.Description: Username for basic authentication. Only used if AUTHTYPE=basic.

Config.Name: Basic Auth Password
Config.Description: Password for basic authentication. Only used if AUTHTYPE=basic. Masked for security.

Config.Name: Google Client ID
Config.Description: From Google Cloud Console. Only used if AUTHTYPE=google. Get from: https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials

Config.Name: Google Client Secret
Config.Description: From Google Cloud Console. Only used if AUTHTYPE=google. Keep this secret!

Config.Name: Google Redirect URI
Config.Description: OAuth callback URL for Google (e.g., https://yourdomain.com/auth/oauth2/callback). Only used if AUTHTYPE=google.

Config.Name: Entra Client ID
Config.Description: From Azure Portal. Only used if AUTHTYPE=entra. Register app in Azure AD.

Config.Name: Entra Client Secret
Config.Description: From Azure Portal. Only used if AUTHTYPE=entra. Keep this secret!

Config.Name: Entra Tenant ID
Config.Description: Your Azure Tenant ID. Only used if AUTHTYPE=entra. Find in Azure Portal.

Config.Name: Entra Redirect URI
Config.Description: OAuth callback URL for Entra (e.g., https://yourdomain.com/auth/oauth2/callback). Only used if AUTHTYPE=entra.

Config.Name: Enable Jellyfin
Config.Description: Enable Jellyfin media server. Set base URL to /jellyfin in Jellyfin settings.

Config.Name: Jellyfin URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for Jellyfin. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Enable Plex
Config.Description: Enable Plex media server. Requires Claim Token on first run.

Config.Name: Plex URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for Plex. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Enable Emby
Config.Description: Enable Emby media server. Configure base URL to /emby in Emby settings.

Config.Name: Emby URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for Emby. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Enable Sonarr
Config.Description: Enable Sonarr TV show automation. Set base URL to /sonarr in Sonarr settings.

Config.Name: Sonarr URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for Sonarr. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Enable Radarr
Config.Description: Enable Radarr movie automation. Set base URL to /radarr in Radarr settings.

Config.Name: Radarr URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for Radarr. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Enable Lidarr
Config.Description: Enable Lidarr music automation. Set base URL to /lidarr in Lidarr settings.

Config.Name: Lidarr URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for Lidarr. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Enable Whisparr
Config.Description: Enable Whisparr adult content automation. Set base URL to /whisparr in settings.

Config.Name: Whisparr URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for Whisparr. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Enable Prowlarr
Config.Description: Enable Prowlarr indexer manager. Set base URL to /prowlarr in Prowlarr settings.

Config.Name: Prowlarr URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for Prowlarr. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Prowlarr API Key
Config.Description: Get from Prowlarr: Settings → General → API Key. Used for health checks.

Config.Name: Enable Jackett
Config.Description: Enable Jackett indexer aggregator. Set base URL to /jackett in Jackett settings.

Config.Name: Jackett URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for Jackett. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Jackett API Key
Config.Description: Get from Jackett: Admin → Dashboard → API Key. Used for health checks.

Config.Name: Enable Seerr
Config.Description: Enable Seerr media requests. Typically runs on subdomain (e.g., seerr.domain.com).

Config.Name: Seerr URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for Seerr. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Seerr API Key
Config.Description: Get from Seerr: Settings → API Keys. Used for health checks.

Config.Name: Enable qBittorrent
Config.Description: Enable qBittorrent torrent client. WebUI accessed via dashboard.

Config.Name: qBittorrent URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for qBittorrent. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: qBittorrent API Key
Config.Description: Get from qBittorrent: Tools → Options → Web UI → API Token. Used for stats.

Config.Name: Enable Transmission
Config.Description: Enable Transmission torrent client. Simple, lightweight option.

Config.Name: Transmission URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for Transmission. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Enable Deluge
Config.Description: Enable Deluge torrent client. Requires session cookie for access.

Config.Name: Deluge URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for Deluge. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Deluge Password
Config.Description: Deluge WebUI password. Used for authentication bypass in dashboard.

Config.Name: Enable SABnzbd
Config.Description: Enable SABnzbd usenet client. Set URL base to /sabnzbd in SABnzbd settings.

Config.Name: SABnzbd URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for SABnzbd. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: SABnzbd API Key
Config.Description: Get from SABnzbd: Config → General → API Key. Used for stats.

Config.Name: Enable NZBget
Config.Description: Enable NZBget usenet client. Configure username and password below.

Config.Name: NZBget URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for NZBget. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: NZBget Username
Config.Description: NZBget username for authentication. Default is 'nzbget'.

Config.Name: NZBget Password
Config.Description: NZBget password for authentication.

Config.Name: Enable NZBHydra
Config.Description: Enable NZBHydra2 usenet meta-search. Set URL base to /nzbhydra in settings.

Config.Name: NZBHydra URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for NZBHydra. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: NZBHydra API Key
Config.Description: Get from NZBHydra: Config → Main → API Key. Used for health checks.

Config.Name: Enable Tautulli
Config.Description: Enable Tautulli Plex analytics and monitoring.

Config.Name: Tautulli URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for Tautulli. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Tautulli API Key
Config.Description: Get from Tautulli: Settings → Web Interface → API Key. Used for stats.

Config.Name: Enable Maintainerr
Config.Description: Enable Maintainerr media server maintenance and automation.

Config.Name: Maintainerr URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for Maintainerr. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Enable Bazarr
Config.Description: Enable Bazarr subtitle manager. Set base URL to /bazarr in settings.

Config.Name: Bazarr URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL for Bazarr. Format: http://container-name:port
